author: customize
text:
balls: changelog: mark [Unreleased] auto-generated; stop hand-curating

Add an HTML comment under [Unreleased] documenting that release-plz owns the file: bullets are auto-generated from commit subjects on each release, the rich "why" lives in commit message bodies (now easy with repeatable -m), and `git show <sha>` / `gh release view` are the lookup tools. References bl-3751 as the case study for why dual-source curation was the wrong call.

Doc-only. `balls:` prefix keeps this commit out of the next changelog cut.
